es·typical·typography·typography·ui·uk·uknonprofit·uktrust·ultrasound·un·unavoidable·uncertainty·unclassified·under·underbust·unemployment·unincorporated·union·unit·units·unity·university·unlabelled·unlimited·unnamed·unofficial·unordered·unsaturated·unsid·unspecified·until·update·updates·upon·upper·upvote·url·urltemplate·urologic·us·usage·use·used·user·users·uses·usnonprofit·utility·utterance·utterances·uuid·uuid·uuid·vacation·valid·validation·value·values·variable·variables·variance·variances·variant·variants·varies·vat·vcard·vedanta·vegan·vegetarian·vehicle·vein·vendor·vendors·vent·venue·verification·versions·vessel·veterinary·video·view·vinyl·violence·virtual·virus·visits·visual·vital·vitepress·vocabulary·void·volcano·volume·vote·waist·waiver·wallet·wallet·want·war·warning·wash·watch·water·waterfall·wave·weapon·wear·wearable·weave·web·website·wednesday·week·weight·wellbeing·western·wheel·wheelbase·where·whole·wholesale·width·win·window·winery·winner·wisdom·withdrawal·withdrawn·within·womens·word·work·worker·workers·workflow·workload·works·workspace·worship·worst·worth·wp·wpad·wpfooter·wpheader·wpside·write·writing·xpath·xray·year·yearly·years·yes·yet·yield·zeropoint·zone·zoo·zoroastrianism
analysis aura
law every directive is saved as a linked law and all emerge from the one — uuid-wiring every dimension raises the graph's coverage, and the modelled tamper-[[cost]] (`coverageCostLog2`) rises with it toward +∞ at coverage = 1 (finite below) under an external [[anchor]]; reciprocity-[[entropy]] is a DISTINCT audit signal, not an input to the cost (reciprocity = 1 ≠ coverage = 1); accept-always, verify-in-[[harmony]], each config a balanced double-entry [[gate]]way through index.ts.

---

<sub>content-uuid `95ccc592-3f8a-8f2b-98e7-2be435c35985` · `pnpm readme` · `pnpm computed:check`</sub>
